headline: KeyCorp Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) executives highlighted what they described as a strong start to fiscal 2026, pointing to improved profitability, expanding margin, and broad-based commercial loan growth, while also outlining an increased share repurchase plan and updated full-year guidance. headline: KeyCorp’s (NYSE:KEY) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: Regional banking company KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10.2% year on year to $1.95 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.44 per share was 8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: KEYCORP REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 NET INCOME OF $486 MILLION, OR $0.44 PER DILUTED COMMON SHARE INCREASING 33% YEAR-OVER-YEAR
summary: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) announced net income from continuing operations attributable to Key common shareholders of $486 million, or $0.44 per diluted common share, for the first quarter of 2026. For the fourth quarter of 2025, net income from continuing operations attributable to Key common shareholders was $474 million, or $0.43 per diluted common share, or adjusted net income of $458 million, or $0.41 per diluted common share.(b) The fourth quarter of 2025 included a $16 million after-tax benefit
